title: The Legends of Rocks, Roger, and Oden Surface
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Toki, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Wano Citizens, Unknown person #3, Luffy as The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.
scene: The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.

dialogue.speaker: Toki
dialogue.text: "We turn back time a little...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Two days before the final battle--

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Our forces are 4,200 strong!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Well done, everyone!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We should use the time we have left to prepare and start moving towards the rendezvous point!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We shall meet at the Promised Port!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Yeah!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All right!! Let's make sure we have enough ships ready for 5,000 people!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Yeah!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We just need to make sure our ships are in position at the promised time, all right!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You can count on us, big bro Frano- Suke!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: All right!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Okay, we're heading to amigasa village to meet up with the rest of our crew.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We'll be aboard the sunny for the final battle!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Okay!! Thanks for the help!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You two are amazing ship- wrights!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Of course we are!! Let's crush...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: The beasts pirates!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: YeaA!!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Wano Citizens
dialogue.text: All around Wano...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: O-Chou is bringing the weapons from Ringo!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Gather anything that can be used as armour here!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I do not know if these are usable, but we have...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Plenty of weapons here that were going to be exported.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: If we assemble too early...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: We will draw unwanted attention- lion...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Once they depart for onigashima, the capital will commence the celebrations for the fire festival!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: No one will pay us any mind!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The PAIR OF BIRDS indicate that we will assemble before sunset, but...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Some government officials will still remain on the main- land...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: "Why, you

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We should proceed with caution so they have no reason to alert oniga- Shima!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Yeah!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Can we really wear these!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Of course!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Awesome!! Look at this kabuto armour!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I wanna show this off to usopp as soon as possible!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: This armour is for true warriors...!! Yohohoho!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Paysky: "I'll

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Kaido, huh? Now there's no way...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I won't cut him down!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Wow, Bropper! You guys look so cool~)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I feel way better about our chances now!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh my, how cute!') You look like insects.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Aren't you gonna wear that stuff, too?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Nah... it'd just slow me down.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You might need it though... your bounty is lower than mine, after all.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Emma!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Whoa!! You wanna go at it, then!? I'll kill you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What are those two doing!?

summary: This section advances the Wano - Oden and the Old Era storyline with 50 dialogue beats. The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.
